title: trifolium squarrosum
intro: Trifolium squarrosum, also known as squarrosum clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Trifolium squarrosum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
